items.situation: quiet study room closing for overhead pipe repair
items.announcement: The Riverside Commons quiet study room will be closed for repairs beginning this Thursday and lasting through the following Tuesday. Maintenance crews discovered a leaking pipe above the ceiling tiles, and fixing it requires shutting off water and power to that entire wing. During the closure, we will be providing overflow study space in Kessler Hall, room 210, open twenty-four hours a day. Please note that any personal belongings left in the lounge lockers must be removed before Wednesday evening, or they will be moved to the front desk. We appreciate your patience while we keep the space safe and comfortable.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce a temporary study room closure
options.B: To promote a new twenty-four-hour study hall
options.C: To encourage more use of the quiet room
options.D: To report a water leak in Kessler Hall

questions.explanation: 正确答案A：通告核心是宣布Riverside Commons安静自习室因修理漏水管道从周四起临时关闭，A准确概括整体目的。B错（too_narrow）：Kessler Hall只是临时替代自习点，通告并非在推广它。C错（reversed_intent）：自习室正在关闭，号召大家多用它与原意相反。D错（wrong_purpose）：漏水管道在Riverside Commons的天花板里，不在Kessler Hall，且通告目的不是报告漏水。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the study space in Kessler Hall?

options.A: It will serve as a permanent study space
options.B: It provides free tutoring during the closure
options.C: It gives students another place to study
options.D: It stays open twenty-four hours each day

questions.explanation: 正确答案C：通告说关闭期间会在Kessler Hall提供替代自习空间，可推断这是给学生的另一处学习地点。A错（over_inference）：只是关闭期间的临时安排，说成永久空间属过度推断。B错（unrelated_inference）：通告完全没提辅导服务，凭空推断。D错（literal_restatement）：二十四小时开放是通告直接陈述的事实，属原文复述，不构成推断，因此不是本推断题的正确项。

items.situation: global flavors food festival hosted by the international students club
items.announcement: Attention students. The International Students Club is thrilled to invite you to our annual Global Flavors Festival this Saturday from noon to 4 p.m. on the main quad. Members from more than fifteen countries will be serving homemade dishes, from Korean dumplings to Brazilian desserts, all prepared in our certified campus kitchen. Live music and traditional dance performances will run throughout the afternoon on the outdoor stage. Admission is free, but reusable tasting tickets cost two dollars each to help cover the ingredient costs. Please bring your student ID to receive a free welcome drink at the entrance table.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To sell tasting tickets for the event
options.B: To invite students to a cultural festival
options.C: To recruit new volunteers for the club kitchen
options.D: To announce that the festival has been canceled

questions.explanation: 正确答案B：通告核心是邀请学生参加国际学生俱乐部举办的全球风味美食节，B准确概括整体目的。A错（too_narrow）：品尝票只是活动中的一个细节，把目的窄化为卖票是片面的。C错（wrong_purpose）：通告没有招募厨房志愿者的内容。D错（reversed_intent）：通告是在宣传和邀请参加，而非宣布取消，意思正好相反。

questions.stem: What must students bring to receive a free welcome drink?

options.A: A ticket bought at the entrance table
options.B: A form signed by a club member
options.C: Two dollars paid at the entrance

questions.explanation: 正确答案D：通告明确说"请带上学生证，到入口处领取免费迎宾饮料"，所以要带学生证。A错（wrong_detail）：品尝票是用来尝美食的，不是领饮料的凭证。B错（related_but_not_stated）：签字表格听起来合理，但通告从未提及。C错（misattributed_detail）：两美元是买品尝票的费用，被错误安到领饮料上，属张冠李戴。

items.situation: dining hall switching to a reduced summer schedule
items.announcement: Good afternoon, everyone. Please be aware that starting next Monday, the Fairview Dining Hall will switch to its summer schedule. Breakfast will now be served from 8 to 10 a.m., and dinner will end at 7 p.m. rather than 9. Please note that the hall will also be closed entirely on Sundays until the fall semester begins. If you rely on a meal plan, you can still use your dining dollars at the Union Café, which keeps its regular hours all summer. We encourage you to check the posted schedule near the Fairview entrance so nobody is caught off guard.

questions.stem: What is this announcement mainly about?

options.A: That Sunday breakfast service is now canceled
options.B: The Union Café's new summer menu options
options.C: The dining hall's new summer schedule
options.D: Longer evening hours at the dining hall

questions.explanation: 正确答案C：通告核心是宣布Fairview餐厅从下周一起改用暑期时间表，C准确概括整体内容。A错（too_narrow）：周日关闭只是暑期安排的一个细节，不能代表整体目的。B错（wrong_purpose）：Union Café只是被提到作为替代，通告并非推广其菜单。D错（reversed_intent）：晚餐时间从9点提前到7点，是缩短而非延长，与原意相反。

questions.stem: What can students on a meal plan do during the summer?

options.A: Use dining dollars at Union Café
options.B: Have breakfast served until early afternoon
options.C: Get a refund for unused meal swipes
options.D: Eat dinner at the hall until nine

questions.explanation: 正确答案A：通告说有膳食计划的学生暑期仍可在Union Café使用餐费点数。B错（wrong_detail）：早餐供应时间是上午8到10点，不会供应到下午。C错（related_but_not_stated）：退款听起来合理，但通告从未提及。D错（misattributed_detail）：晚餐现在7点结束，把关闭前的9点安到暑期上，属张冠李戴。

items.situation: honors program oral thesis defense scheduling notice
items.announcement: I want to remind everyone in the honors program that oral thesis defenses are scheduled for the week of April 20th. Each candidate will present in Thompson Hall, room 314, during a thirty-minute slot assigned by the department office. You should arrive at least fifteen minutes early, and please bring three printed copies of your thesis for the committee. Please note that the sign-up sheet for time slots closes this Friday at 5 p.m., and late requests cannot be accommodated. Your faculty advisor is required to attend, so confirm their availability before choosing your slot. Refreshments will be provided in the lounge afterward.

questions.stem: What must candidates bring to their thesis defense?

options.A: A signed approval form from the registrar
options.B: A single digital copy of the thesis
options.C: Refreshments to share with the committee
options.D: Three printed copies of their thesis

questions.explanation: 正确答案D：通告说要为委员会带三份打印好的论文。A错（related_but_not_stated）：注册处签字表听起来合理，但通告未提及。B错（wrong_detail）：要求是三份纸质而非一份电子版，篡改了关键事实。C错（misattributed_detail）：茶点是院系事后在休息室提供的，不是学生要带来给委员会的，属张冠李戴。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about signing up for a time slot?

options.A: The department plans to add extra defense days
options.B: Late sign-ups risk losing a good slot
options.C: Committee members decide the presentation order
options.D: Each defense lasts exactly thirty minutes

questions.explanation: 正确答案B：通告说报名表本周五5点截止且逾期不予受理，可推断拖延报名的人可能抢不到合适的时段。A错（over_inference）：通告没说会增加答辩日，属过度推断。C错（unrelated_inference）：委员会安排展示顺序在文中毫无依据。D错（literal_restatement）：每场三十分钟是通告直接陈述的事实，属原文复述而非推断，因此不是本推断题的正确项。

items.situation: alumna returning to give a public talk about her research career
items.announcement: We're excited to announce that Dr. Elena Marsh, a graduate of our biology department, will return to campus to give a public talk next Thursday at 5 p.m. in Harborview Auditorium. Dr. Marsh now leads a marine research lab and will discuss how her undergraduate fieldwork here shaped her career studying coral reefs. Please note that the talk is free and open to everyone, though seating is limited to two hundred people. We encourage you to arrive early, since seats are offered on a first-come basis. A brief reception with the speaker will follow in the lobby afterward.

questions.stem: What will Dr. Marsh talk about?

options.A: How her fieldwork shaped her career
options.B: How students should apply to graduate school
options.C: Openings available at her marine research lab
options.D: Ways to fund undergraduate research trips

questions.explanation: 正确答案A：通告说Marsh博士将讲述她在本校的本科野外实践如何塑造了她研究珊瑚礁的职业道路。B错（wrong_detail）：研究生申请是酒会上可以问的话题，不是演讲主题，篡改了细节。C错（misattributed_detail）：她领导海洋研究实验室是背景信息，通告没说有职位空缺，属张冠李戴。D错（related_but_not_stated）：本科科研经费听起来相关，但通告从未提及。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about arriving early to the talk?

options.A: Latecomers will be denied entry entirely
options.B: The talk will be recorded for online viewing
options.C: Seats could fill up before latecomers arrive
options.D: The event is open to the general public

questions.explanation: 正确答案C：通告说座位限两百人且先到先得，并鼓励早到，可推断迟到者到场时座位可能已满。A错（over_inference）：座位有限不等于迟到就完全被拒之门外，属过度推断。B错（unrelated_inference）：通告没提录像或线上观看，凭空推断。D错（literal_restatement）：面向所有人开放是通告直接陈述的事实，属原文复述而非关于早到的推断，因此不是本题正确项。
